📊 Dashboard 🔑 IFlow Roles

📋 Deployment JSON Template

New JSON format with per-environment overrides. One file per package, containing this section for each IFlow.
💡 Replace <your-iflow-artifact-id> and <Your IFlow Name> with actual values.
Place this file at: IntegrationPackages/<PackageFolder>/Configuration/Deployment_INTEGRATION_FLOW.json

📋 Legend

✅Deployed / Enabled / Started
❌Not deployed / Disabled
⚫Not available on runtime
⚠️No Git configuration found (BTP-only) / Different values across stages
🔴Error / ERROR log level
🟡Warning / Old JSON format
🔵INFO log level
🟢New JSON format
🔍Exists in Git but not found on BTP
📦 Not foundPackage does not exist on this environment
—Not configured / Unknown

JSON Format: 🟢 new = Enhanced format with Environments overrides | 🟡 old = Legacy format with flat Deploy flag | ⚪ none = No deployment configuration found

Scope: This dashboard considers Integration Flow (IFlow) artifacts only. Other artifact types such as Value Mappings, Script Collections, or Message Mappings are not included.
